skill.body:
# Asset Reporting and Analytics
## Overview This skill enables practitioners to produce actionable insights from asset data, supporting managerial decision-making, financial planning, and operational oversight.
## Report Types
### Inventory Reports - Total assets by category, department, and status - Assets approaching end-of-life or full depreciation - Unassigned or idle assets
### Financial Reports - Asset valuation and book value summaries - Accumulated depreciation per category - Total cost of ownership per department
### Maintenance Reports - Upcoming and overdue maintenance schedules - Maintenance cost analysis per asset or category - Mean time between failures (MTBF) tracking
### Audit and Compliance Reports - User activity summaries from audit logs - Asset status change history - Policy compliance indicators
## Key Responsibilities - Design and maintain report templates for recurring use - Deliver scheduled reports to Managers and Admins - Identify trends and anomalies in asset data - Support data exports for external analysis
## Related Entities - Asset, Category, Department, MaintenanceRecord, AuditLog
skill.description: Ability to design and generate asset management reports covering inventory summaries, depreciation status, maintenance history, and department-level asset allocations.
skill.name: Asset Reporting and Analytics
